name: Vikram Chopra
tagline: I am the founder of Cars24. These essays are the worldview underneath it: how a country learns to own cars, why trust is the real product in mobility, what a company becomes when AI collapses the cost of coordination, and how a builder stays clear-eyed while the stakes rise.
description: I am the founder of Cars24. These essays are the worldview underneath it: how a country learns to own cars, why trust is the real product in mobility, what a company becomes when AI collapses the cost of coordination, and how a builder stays clear-eyed while the stakes rise.
socialDescription: Founder of Cars24. Essays on car ownership in India, trust as the product, AI-native companies, and staying clear-eyed while the stakes rise.
socialImageAlt: Social preview for Essays by Vikram Chopra.
intro: I am the founder of Cars24. These essays are the worldview underneath it: how a country learns to own cars, why trust is the real product in mobility, what a company becomes when AI collapses the cost of coordination, and how a builder stays clear-eyed while the stakes rise.
about: I write to think. I publish to be argued with.
footerNote: Built for long arguments, sharp ideas, and posts worth rereading.

subscribe.line: New essays by email, a few times a year.
subscribe.homeTitle: Get the next essay by email
subscribe.homeBody: I publish infrequently. Email is the cleanest way to hear when a new essay is live.
subscribe.homeDetail: No cadence for the sake of cadence. Just new essays when there is something worth saying.
subscribe.essayTitle: If this was worth your time, get the next one by email
subscribe.essayBody: A few essays a year. No feed-chasing. No filler.
subscribe.pageTitle: Get new essays without depending on the feed
subscribe.pageDek: I publish infrequently. Email is the cleanest way to hear when a new essay is live.
subscribe.pageBody: No newsletter treadmill. No weekly note. Just new writing when there is something worth sending.
subscribe.finePrint: After you submit, Buttondown may ask for a quick verification and will then send a confirmation email.

interviews.title: He Built India's Biggest Car Selling & Purchasing Platform
interviews.description: A wide-ranging conversation on building Cars24, leadership, hiring, scaling, and lessons learned from Mahendra Singh Dhoni.

interviews.title: Meet Cars24 Founder
interviews.description: A conversation on the early journey behind Cars24, ambition, and the mindset required to build through uncertainty.

interviews.title: How Cars24 CEO, Vikram Chopra Built a Rs 27,000 cr used car startup
interviews.description: A detailed conversation on growing Cars24, the used-car market, early company building, and the journey from Raebareli to scaling a large business.

interviews.title: Playing the long game: what it takes to build generation defining companies
interviews.description: A panel on building enduring companies, with Vikram Chopra alongside Asish Mohapatra and Varun Alagh.

elsewhere.title: What You're Actually Paying For When You Buy a Used Car Online
elsewhere.description: A detailed argument about pricing, trust, and what buyers are really comparing when they evaluate used-car platforms against local dealers.

elsewhere.title: How we use AI will determine our success
elsewhere.description: An early articulation of Cars24's view that appraisal quality, pricing accuracy, and AI-driven learning would determine who wins the used-car market.

elsewhere.title: The world is in a bad place this year, but I need to take a long-term view
elsewhere.description: A conversation on navigating a funding winter, reducing burn, and making decisions with a multi-decade view of the business.

elsewhere.title: 'Political Will' Is India’s Biggest Failure in Air Pollution Control
elsewhere.description: An argument for uncomfortable public-policy action on pollution, even when that stance cuts against the immediate interests of the car industry.

elsewhere.title: Rising Strong: The Art of Failing Forward
elsewhere.description: A short reflection on failure, resilience, and the emotional work required to keep moving after setbacks.

elsewhere.title: Embracing Discomfort for Growth
elsewhere.description: A note on choosing discomfort deliberately as a condition for growth, ambition, and better judgment.
